Name: BetterShopAuctionMythologyUI
Description: Greek-mythology UI override pack for BetterShopAuction. Adds custom marble / gold / laurel-green / olympian-blue textures (containers, buttons, separators) and the .ui files referencing them. When installed alongside the main BetterShopAuction plugin, this pack overrides the vanilla game-asset look with a temple-of-Olympus theme — cracked white marble, gilded trims, laurel-leaf accents, and warm temple-torch glows. Remove this plugin to fall back to vanilla styling. Conflicts with other UI theme packs (Modern, Medieval, ForestWood, Dungeon) — install only one theme at a time.
